client_psychology: Clients seek visible skin improvement and expert guidance they can't get from products alone. They value education — they want to understand WHY a treatment works. Trust builds slowly through results. Once they see their skin improve, they become loyal monthly clients. Many are frustrated by years of trial-and-error with products and want a professional to take the guesswork out.
